objective.summary: Implement the R1 unified panel reader by adding read_panel, composing S05 read_panel_as_of outputs into a prefixed multi-dataset as-of panel.
non_goals: Do not write or modify market_data/catalog.py
Do not implement S07 read-layer dedup
Do not execute runtime, provider, NAS, QMT, real lake, or published pointer advance operations

feature_contract_summary: FEAT-02 owns the read-side panel API; FEAT-03 consumes it read-only. read_panel composes read_dataset published gating and S05 PIT filtering.

cr_delta.summary: Adds read_panel and UnknownDatasetError in readers.py with fixture coverage for multi-dataset as-of joins, unpublished dataset handling, unknown dataset errors, and adjustment policy gate.

acceptance: read_panel joins prices, financial_pit, market_cap and industry_classification fixture data into a prefixed as-of panel
Future financial rows with available_at > as_of do not appear
Unpublished dataset contributes issue and no candidate columns
Unknown dataset without reader raises UnknownDatasetError
No writes or code modifications to market_data/catalog.py
verification_plan: uv run --python 3.11 pytest -q tests/test_cr139_s01_inventory.py tests/test_cr139_s02_golden_baseline.py tests/test_cr139_duplicate_fingerprint_profiling.py tests/test_cr139_published_pointer.py tests/test_cr139_pit_as_of_reader.py tests/test_cr139_panel_reader.py tests/test_cr014_catalog_publish_gate.py tests/test_cr014_p0_pipeline_contract.py
